title: Trailer procured for strays animal control
description: KNYSNA NEWS - In a practical step towards...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - In a practical step towards enforcement, Knysna Municipality has confirmed it is in the process of procuring a trailer to begin the impounding of stray animals.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - In a practical step towards enforcement, Knysna Municipality has confirmed it is in the process of procuring a trailer to begin the impounding of stray animals."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This move follows a string of incidents involving roaming cattle, including another recent accident along George Rex Drive which has reignited public concern over the ongoing livestock crisis."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In response, the municipality has officially established a Livestock Task Team, comprising representatives from various departments including Community Services, Legal Services, Environmental Management, and Local Economic Development.","html":"In response, the municipality has officially established a Livestock Task Team, comprising representatives from various departments including Community Services, Legal Services, Environmental Management, and Local Economic Development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"External stakeholders such as the police, the Department of Agriculture, local farmers associations, and animal welfare organisations may also be brought in as needed.","html":"External stakeholders such as the police, the Department of Agriculture, local farmers associations, and animal welfare organisations may also be brought in as needed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to municipal communications officer Nwabisa Pondoyi, the purpose of the task team is to investigate the feasibility of creating a municipal commonage and animal pound, identify suitable land, and propose a sustainable solution to manage stray livestock in the area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DA Councillor Sharon Sabbagh, who recently issued a statement announcing the start of impoundment from 25 August, is confirmed to be a member of the task team, representing the council. The municipality clarified, however, that she serves as a regular member and not in a leadership role.","html":"DA Councillor Sharon Sabbagh, who recently issued a statement announcing the start of impoundment from 25 August, is confirmed to be a member of the task team, representing the council. The municipality clarified, however, that she serves as a regular member and not in a leadership role."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A key meeting held on 22 August focused on finalising task team membership, discussing the Terms of Reference, and reviewing a draft register to document livestock ownership across the municipality.","html":"A key meeting held on 22 August focused on finalising task team membership, discussing the Terms of Reference, and reviewing a draft register to document livestock ownership across the municipality."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Among its objectives, the task team will assess the demand for commonage land, evaluate legal requirements, consult with communities, and develop a detailed implementation plan,\" said Pondoyi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality says it is committed to balancing enforcement with long-term planning to ensure public safety and better livestock management in the greater Knysna area.","html":"The municipality says it is committed to balancing enforcement with long-term planning to ensure public safety and better livestock management in the greater Knysna area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Stray animals in residential areas a problem","Knysna acts on livestock crisis","Roaming cattle cause another crash in Knysna"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Trailer procured for strays animal control
